parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.website,
  c.company_name,
  c.report_json
FROM companies c
WHERE c.website = '{{ $json.website }}' 
AND c.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO companies (
  website,
  company_name,
  industry,
  business_model,
  products,
  pain_points,
  report_json,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.website }}',
  '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.industry.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.business_model.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $json.products.map(p => "'" + p.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  ARRAY[{{ $json.pain_points.map(p => "'" + p.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.report_json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (website) 
DO UPDATE SET
  company_name = EXCLUDED.company_name,
  industry = EXCLUDED.industry,
  business_model = EXCLUDED.business_model,
  products = EXCLUDED.products,
  pain_points = EXCLUDED.pain_points,
  report_json = EXCLUDED.report_json,
  created_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  status: "success",
  cached: false,
  company: {
    name: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.company_name,
    website: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.website,
    industry: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.industry,
    business_model: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.business_model,
    products: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.products,
    ideal_customers: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.ideal_customers,
    pain_points: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.pain_points,
    competitive_advantages: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.competitive_advantages,
    recommended_persona: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.recommended_persona,
    outreach_angle: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.outreach_angle,
    discovery_questions: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.discovery_questions,
    confidence_score: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.confidence_score
  },
  buying_signals: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.buying_signals || {},
  outreach: $('Parse Outreach').item.json.outreach
}) }}

parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36
